response.justification: Strong technical engineer with 19 years of experience and Staff-level credentials across infrastructure, full-stack, and emerging AI work. However, the role explicitly seeks "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms," and this resume shows only recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, agent frameworks) rather than substantial AI/ML products or strategic advisory experience. Missing Master's/PhD in AI and no evidence of Director-level strategic leadership or cloud platform architecture strategy—both preferred qualifications. Better fit as Senior/Staff engineer than as a Principal/Director-level strategist.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 19 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, hardware, and infrastructure
Demonstrated engineering leadership through Staff roles, open-source leadership (Northwind Labs), and mentorship (workshops, Code Katas, public talks)
Current AI infrastructure work with MCP code generators and agentic workflows shows relevant emerging capability
concerns: No Master's/PhD in AI or AI-related field; lacks the specialized AI education preferred for Principal-level strategy role
AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused rather than demonstrated through shipped AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership
No evidence of Director-level strategic responsibility, customer advisory experience, or cloud/AI platform strategy—core to the Principal IC role
